zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于短线震荡偏弱结构，价格运行在20日均线下方，整体趋势偏空但下行动能有限，市场进入窄幅整理阶段，等待方向确认观察

技术指标显示MACD为负值且柱体扩张，空头动能占优；价格持续低于SMA20，反弹受均线压制；RSI缺失但情绪偏弱信号延续

短期支撑位关注6.46附近低点区域，若跌破可能下探6.40；上方阻力位在6.58及6.60一线，突破需放量确认为关键位

交易策略建议以反弹做空为主，若价格无法站上SMA20可逢高布局空单，严格设置止损于6.60上方控制风险谨慎操作避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading around 6.47, showing extremely tight intraday consolidation with minimal volatility. The broader short-term structure remains slightly bearish as price holds below the 20-day simple moving average at 6.588. Despite a marginal 24-hour gain, momentum lacks conviction, and buyers have yet to reclaim higher levels. Overall trend suggests a range-bound market with downward bias unless resistance is reclaimed decisively.

Indicator readings reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD stands at -0.058, indicating negative momentum and continued bearish pressure, while the signal line is not yet confirmed for a bullish crossover. With RSI data unavailable, momentum confirmation relies heavily on price action and moving averages. The inability to sustain above the SMA20 suggests weakening bullish strength and potential for continued sideways-to-bearish movement in the near term.

Immediate support is located near the recent intraday low around 6.461, which aligns closely with the current trading floor. A breakdown below this level could expose the 6.40 psychological zone as the next support. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the SMA20 near 6.59, followed by stronger resistance around 6.70, where previous supply has emerged and rejected upward attempts.

Given the current compression and weak momentum, trading conditions favor short-term range strategies rather than directional positions. Traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls or fading moves into resistance. A confirmed breakout above 6.59 would be required to shift bias toward bullish continuation, while a loss of 6.46 would strengthen downside momentum and open room for further decline in the near term.
